label: Little Garden prehistoric duel island system

anchor.name: Little Garden
anchor.debut_audit: data/canon.json chapter 114 is an approach/next-destination gate; chapter 115 is the verified island arrival and first safe visual gate.

atlas_anchor.warning: The atlas point is deterministic route placement, not canon geography or a source for local bearings.

verified_relationships: Little Garden is a tropical island whose prehistoric ecosystem and giant vegetation dominate its readable silhouette.
The Hourly Volcano stands in the island interior and its eruption signals the recurring duel.
Dorry and Brogy use separate camps and meet at a shared duel ground.
Old sailor remains and wreckage communicate that prior visitors did not survive the island easily.
interpolated_relationships: Coastline, volcano height, canopy density, camp-to-clearing routes, and Sea King Mountain placement are visual interpolation.
No exact camp bearings, island diameter, duel-ground footprint, or travel distance is asserted.
The local scene is oriented for a readable camera, not aligned to the derived atlas point.
topology.transformation_policy: The geography is static. The volcano effect is an environmental signal only; giant combat and dinosaur action are outside this geographic asset.

chapter_logic.default_rule: Render only components whose reveal_chapter is less than or equal to the reader chapter; chapter 114 and earlier render no model.
chapter_logic.unknown_gate_rule: Do not add Mr. 3 set pieces, exact duel choreography, creature encounters, or uncited paths as geography.

proposed_local_scene_layout.root: LG_ROOT at local origin with sea-level Z=0

zones.placement: surrounds the interior with two navigable breaks
interior high point; exact canon center not claimed

zones.purpose: two camp pockets feeding one broad clearing

proposed_local_scene_layout.camera_read: Low coastal approach reveals canopy first, then the volcano and duel clearing at higher chapter gates.

unreal_runtime_reuse.unreal_notes: Keep canopy, volcano, camps, clearing, and FX as separately gateable actors or Nanite/HISM groups. Use a Niagara plume only as an optional environmental reference.
unreal_runtime_reuse.map_runtime_notes: Export named component roots with glTF extras for reveal_chapter and default_hidden. Use the atlas anchor only to enter the local theatre.
unreal_runtime_reuse.lod_policy: Preserve the volcano/canopy silhouette at distance; collapse camp props and remains first.

coordinate_policy.warning: No canon dimensions or local bearings are encoded.

integration_contract.node_gate_policy: Read component_id, reveal_chapter, verification, and default_hidden from glTF extras.

unresolved: Exact coastline, island dimensions, elevation, and volcano measurements are unknown and must remain interpolation.
Exact bearings and distances among the camps, duel clearing, coast, and volcano are not established.
The named Sea King Mountain silhouettes do not provide a measured contour; use representative fossil-like landforms only.
The eruption cadence can be referenced after chapter 118, but plume size and timing must not imply panel-exact animation.
Story-specific wax structures and combat damage remain withheld from this geographic contract.
